name: No Cook Peachy Orange Jam
recipeIngredient: Orange, peeled and sectioned without membranes
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate orange rind.
2. Section the orange and place sections with the rind in a large bowl.
3. Add peaches, cherries, lemon juice, and sugar to the bowl. Mix well and let stand for 10 minutes.
4. In a small saucepan, combine water and Certo pectin crystals. Boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Stir the pectin mixture into the fruit mixture until most of the sugar is dissolved, stirring for about 3 minutes.
6. Pour the mixture into clean jars or plastic containers. Cover tightly with lids.
7. Allow the jam to set at room temperature for 24 hours before refrigerating. It will also keep in the refrigerator for up to 3 weeks.
